%% This is a citation summary file generated by Sherpa 3.1.x
%% on Fri Feb 13 14:52:58 2026.
%% It contains LaTeX-style citations for Sherpa and any external
%% scientific software or physics results used to generate the given result with
%% Sherpa. Upload this file to https://inspirehep.net/bibliography-generator to
%% generate a bibliography for your publication.

\documentclass{article}

\begin{document}

The complete Sherpa package is published under \cite{Sherpa:2024mfk}.
LHAPDF6 is published under \cite{Buckley:2014ana}.
YFS Form Factor as implemented in \cite{Jadach:1999vf}
The Catani-Seymour subtraction based shower is published under \cite{Schumann:2007mg}.
Amegic is published under \cite{Krauss:2001iv}.
Comix is published under \cite{Gleisberg:2008fv}.
The OpenLoops library~\cite{Cascioli:2011va} of virtual
matrix elements has been used. 
It is partly based on the tensor integral reduction described 
in~\cite{Denner:2002ii,Denner:2005nn,Denner:2010tr}.

The automation of MCatNLO is published in \cite{Hoeche:2011fd}.
The automated generation of Catani-Seymour dipole terms in Amegic is published under \cite{Gleisberg:2007md}.
FastJet is published under \cite{Cacciari:2011ma}.
Ahadic is described in \cite{Chahal:2022rid}.
Photons is published under \cite{Schonherr:2008av}.
The HepMC3 library is described in \cite{Buckley:2019xhk}.
The Rivet toolkit is described in \cite{Bierlich:2019rhm}.

\end{document}
